name: file-link-kekupload
description: A simple extension to upload attachment files to KekUpload
author: CraftingDragon007

scripts.compile: npm run clean && tsc -p . && cp *.html dist && cp manifest.json dist && browserify ./dist/main.js -o ./main.js && rm ./dist/main.js && mv ./main.js ./dist/main.js
scripts.compileWin: npm run cleanWin && tsc -p . && copy management.html .\dist && copy settings.html .\dist && copy manifest.json .\dist && browserify ./dist/main.js -o ./main.js && del .\dist\main.js && move .\main.js .\dist\main.js
